spanish: nunca me habían sacado un diente
english: I had never had a tooth extracted
explanation: Past perfect (habían sacado) - action that had never occurred before another past moment

spanish: cuando estaba el dentista sacándome el diente
english: when the dentist was taking out my tooth
explanation: Imperfect progressive (estaba sacándome) - ongoing action interrupted by another action

spanish: para qué tener una pudiendo tener tres
english: why have one when you can have three
explanation: Gerund (pudiendo) expressing manner or condition - 'being able to'
